name: After New Endpoint
description: Checks observability pillars when a new service or controller is created

then.prompt: A new backend file was just created. Please: 1) Run /check-obs on the new file to verify all 3 observability pillars are present (structured logs with event field, Prometheus metrics, Sentry.captureException with tags). 2) If it is a controller, verify @ApiTags and @ApiOperation decorators are present for Swagger. 3) Report PASS or list exactly what is missing with the fix.
